item.title: Why is Goldkart Jewels Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 11-May, Goldkart Jewels Ltd experienced a notable decline in its share price, falling by 5.0% to close at ₹171.95, marking a fresh 52-week low. This downturn reflects a continuation of recent negative trends despite the stock's impressive long-term gains. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Why is Cantabil Retail India Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 11 May, Cantabil Retail India Ltd’s stock price has fallen sharply by 3.61% to ₹232.25, reflecting a broader pattern of underperformance despite the company’s strong long-term growth metrics and attractive valuation ratios. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Why is Rose Merc. Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of the latest available data, Rose Merc. Ltd’s stock price has experienced a slight decline, reflecting broader challenges faced over recent weeks and months despite a strong one-year performance. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Why is Inox Wind Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 11-May, Inox Wind Ltd's stock price fell by 3.57% to close at ₹99.90, continuing a three-day losing streak amid broader sector weakness and reduced investor participation. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Why is JSW Dulux Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 11-May, JSW Dulux Ltd's stock price rose by 3.28% to ₹3,045.85, reflecting renewed investor confidence following a brief decline. This upward movement is supported by a combination of robust management efficiency, attractive dividend yield, and increased trading activity, positioning the stock favourably against its sector and benchmark indices. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Why is Remi Edelstahl Tubulars Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 11-May, Remi Edelstahl Tubulars Ltd witnessed a significant price surge, closing at ₹197.70, up ₹15.35 or 8.42%, marking a fresh 52-week and all-time high of ₹198.2. This rally reflects robust investor confidence and sustained outperformance against key benchmarks and sector peers. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Why is Karnataka Bank Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 11-May, Karnataka Bank Ltd’s share price declined by 2.85% to close at ₹251.95, reflecting a short-term correction after a period of strong gains. Despite this recent fall, the stock continues to demonstrate robust long-term performance and solid fundamentals. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Why is GRM Overseas Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 11-May, GRM Overseas Ltd witnessed a decline in its share price, closing at ₹157.00, down ₹3.7 or 2.3% from the previous close. This movement reflects a continuation of recent short-term weakness despite the company’s strong long-term fundamentals and recent positive earnings performance. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Why is Shanthi Gears Ltd. falling/rising?
item.description: As of 11 May, Shanthi Gears Ltd. has experienced a notable decline in its share price, falling by 1.84% to ₹453.00. This downward movement reflects a combination of disappointing recent financial performance, expensive valuation metrics, and subdued investor interest, despite the company’s strong long-term growth fundamentals. Time: 6 hours ago
